questionHtml: Write an equation that shows how sulfur dioxide can produce acid rain.
markschemeHtml:
SO2 (g) + H2O (l) → H2SO3 (aq)

OR

SO2 (g) + ½O2 (g) → SO3 (g)  AND  SO3 (g) + H2O (l) → H2SO4 (aq)

OR

SO2 (g) + ½O2 (g) + H2O (l) → H2SO4 (aq) ✔

 

Accept ionized forms of acids.

meta.title: Write an equation that shows how sulfur dioxide can produce acid rain.
